summary: Code quality is high (Set-StrictMode, proper error handling, clear structure), but deliverable is incomplete and has critical security violations. (1) Actions not pinned to SHA: workflow uses `actions/checkout@v4` and `actions/upload-artifact@v4` instead of full 40-char commit SHAs—explicit requirement violation. (2) Missing fixtures: Run-ActTests.ps1 references run1.xml, run2.xml, run3.json but these don't exist; task required fixture creation. (3) Missing TestResultsAggregator.Tests.ps1: workflow and test harness reference it; not provided. (4) Missing .actrc: listed in projectFiles but absent. Without these, `act` and test harness will fail immediately. Well-architected module (ConvertFrom-JUnitXml, flaky-test detection, markdown generation) and thoughtful test harness design (temp git repos, AGGREGATE_RESULT parsing), but solution cannot run as delivered.
